codeReview.summary: The feature stayed tightly scoped to the timeout-sensitive CeFi/DeFi overlapping-token assertion and preserved all existing contract checks. The only code change converts the prior trailing 10s timeout into a test-local 15s timeout, and the worker handoff/transcript provide measured runtime evidence (~3.1-3.9s targeted and ~3.3s under the passing full suite) that justifies the narrower timeout increase rather than a broad workaround.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill/shared-state references, and commit 9847d07. The implementation satisfies the assigned scope, remains narrowly targeted, preserves coverage materially intact, and presents measured evidence for the timeout adjustment; no actionable code-review or shared-state gaps were found.
